title: Senior Doctor - Fortis Healthcare Global Group - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Fortis Healthcare Global Group - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Fortis Healthcare Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Doctor to join our dynamic team in Tiruchirappalli. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Fortis Healthcare Global Group:
Fortis Healthcare Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fortis Healthcare Global Group!
